THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTER, JACKIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORRESTIER, HERVE DBA LE FRENCH BAKER LE FRENCH BAKER, INC $2,100.93 PRINCIPAL, $82.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,182.93, DEFENDANTS HAVE JOINT AND SEVERAL LIABILITY. PER CALIFORNIA DMV RECORDS, PLAINTIFF'S CAR WAS SALVAGED ON 7/12/00. PER KELLY BLUE BOOK, A VEHICLE WITH A BRANDED TITLE (SALVAGE..) IS CONSIDERED TO BER IN "POOR" CONDITION. "A VEHICLE IN POOR CONDITION MAY REQUIRE AN INDEPENDANT APPRAISAL TO DETERMINE ITS VALUE" STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
